title: Joy Speaks
content:
One with the Heaven above
    Am I its bliss:
    Part of its truth and love,
    And what God is.
    I heal the soul and mind:
    I work their cures:
    Not Grief, that rends Mankind,
    But Joy endures.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Madison Julius Cawein, titled "Joy Speaks", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
